title: About us - X Labs
text: 078 629 09 06 City Menu EN DE City EN DE Discover ･ Experiment ･ Have fun DiscoverExperimentHave fun Welcome to X Labs! We are a team of enthusiastic young researchers graduated from Swiss universities and high technical schools. Our mission is to inspire curiosity through engaging STEM learning experiences. We organize awesome science birthday parties, stimulating workshops and exciting vacation camps in Switzerland since 2014. Feel like a real scientist All children actively participate in our workshops. Instead of just watching and listening, they get hands-on experience, manipulate, observe and explore the incredible world of science. Play and learn with safe and fun experiments Safety and wellbeing of all participants is our priority. We choose the best activities which suit the age of participants. All experiments are performed under adult supervision. Discover science with our enthusiastic mediators Our scientific mediators are not ordinary animators but students and graduates of science or engineering faculties of Swiss universities and high technical schools. Amaze your guests with glow props After the science program the party continues in a fascinating dark room. We use fluorescent decoration and props glowing in the black light. Contact form Please feel free to contact us if you need any further information City Zurich Geneva Lausanne Send Subscribe to our newsletter Be the first to hear about our events, workshops and camps. And no spam, of course.
